Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 132 

SR_CORE_FOOD_2_CD 

LABEL: Core HRSN Food 2: Food Bought Didn't Last and Didn't Have Money to Get More 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) food bought didn't last and didn't have 
money to get more. 

LONG NAME: SR_CORE_FOOD_2_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Never True 
1 = Sometimes True 
2 = Often True
